MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RPM OPTOELECTRONICS, INC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is granted. Inadequate proof of diligence or service on an appropriate person. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
